titles.title: It’s Me It’s Me O Lord

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer; It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Not My Brother, Not My Sister, But It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer; Not My Brother, Not My Sister, But It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer; It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Not The Preacher, Not The Deacon, But It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer; Not The Preacher, Not The Deacon, But It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer; It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Not My Father, Not My Mother, But It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer; Not My Father, Not My Mother, But It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer; It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Not The Stranger, Not My Neighbour, But It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer; Not The Stranger, Not My Neighbour, But It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer; It’s Me, It’s Me, O Lord, Standing In The Need Of Prayer.
